name: cattle-vaccination-docs
description: A solution for recording and regulating cattle vaccination compliance.

scripts.slides:solution-overview: node scripts/process-mermaid-in-markdown.js technology/quality-assurance-view/solution-overview/solution-overview.md technology/quality-assurance-view/solution-overview/solution-overview-processed.md && marp --no-stdin --allow-local-files --theme ./technology/quality-assurance-view/solution-overview/assets/defra-marp-theme.css ./technology/quality-assurance-view/solution-overview/solution-overview-processed.md --pdf --output output/cattle-vaccination-solution-overview.pdf && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./technology/quality-assurance-view/solution-overview/solution-overview-processed.md', { force: true })"
